description: A lexicon for long form rich media documents

blobPages.description: JSON-encoded array of pages. When the inline pages array would be too large to store on the PDS, the pages are uploaded as a blob and referenced here. When set, consumers MUST ignore `pages` and use the decoded blob contents as the page array; the inline `pages` field will be empty or a stub.

blobs.description: Blobs referenced inside `blobPages`. Load-bearing when `blobPages` is set: the PDS only scans the top level of a record for blob references when deciding what to garbage-collect, so any image/etc. blob now living inside the opaque JSON blob must be mirrored here to remain referenced.
